title: uglify-js@2.7.5 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [uglify-js](https://www.npmjs.com/package/uglify-js) just published its new version 2.7.5.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency uglify-js
New version 2.7.5
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As uglify-js is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 7 commits . - [`f637248`](https://github.com/mishoo/UglifyJS2/commit/f6372483a0c555a3aaf900ffa1a9ccc6585b59f9) v2.7.5 - [`98f3306`](https://github.com/mishoo/UglifyJS2/commit/98f330658f5cd0dfb3004815d05f123f4110c2e0) Generate source map data from normalized files - [`a7b3b0d`](https://github.com/mishoo/UglifyJS2/commit/a7b3b0d3a55e2c48b63102dd111f27f8b9717788) docs: add doc for option.outFileName - [`0a35acb`](https://github.com/mishoo/UglifyJS2/commit/0a35acbbe7e663c643c5b227e455816278e08b89) feat: add option.outFileName for JS API, if absense, sourceMap.file field will deduced - [`2a9989d`](https://github.com/mishoo/UglifyJS2/commit/2a9989dd18c01081c486fe9089e3bb64079c773b) Add --mangle-props-debug and fix --mangle-props=unquoted collision - [`79b98a9`](https://github.com/mishoo/UglifyJS2/commit/79b98a9fe87f950607c601a45a3566a46c32f425) Do not overwrite options.comments + cleanup - [`057de57`](https://github.com/mishoo/UglifyJS2/commit/057de570e69b300ca472719cb234a32e593d34ec) Pass mangle options to figure_out_scope before mangling in tests See the [full diff](https://github.com/mishoo/UglifyJS2/compare/557b3e412fb44906e0a41dc2c209e5712bd67974...f6372483a0c555a3aaf900ffa1a9ccc6585b59f9). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
